common_ai_mistakes.name: new_list_from_linq
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI creates a new List<T> then immediately fills it with AddRange or a loop. Use LINQ's ToList() or collection expressions directly.
common_ai_mistakes.detection: Detect var list = new List<T>(); followed by AddRange or loop.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Use var list = source.Where(...).ToList(); or collection expressions [..items].

common_ai_mistakes.name: string_interpolation_over_format
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI uses String.Format() when string interpolation ($"") is cleaner and less error-prone.

common_ai_mistakes.name: task_run_for_async
common_ai_mistakes.description: AI wraps synchronous code in Task.Run to make it 'async'. This wastes a thread pool thread. Only use Task.Run for CPU-bound work off the UI thread.
common_ai_mistakes.fix: Use proper async APIs (e.g., ReadAsync, SendAsync). Don't fake async with Task.Run.
